tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ichigo Kurosaki is the main protagonist of Bleach who gains the powers of a Soul Reaper.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Ichigo possesses immense spiritual power, Bankai transformation and Hollow abilities.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Ichigo protects both the human world and the Soul Society from powerful enemies.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Rukia Kuchiki is the Soul Reaper who transfers her powers to Ichigo.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Rukia uses powerful ice-based techniques with her Zanpakuto.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Rukia belongs to the noble Kuchiki clan in Soul Society.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Byakuya Kuchiki is the captain of the 6th Division in the Soul Society.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: His Zanpakuto transforms into thousands of blade petals.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Byakuya is known for his calm personality and strong sense of honor.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Toshiro Hitsugaya is the youngest captain in the Soul Society.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: His Zanpakuto controls ice and snow in combat.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Hitsugaya is considered a prodigy among Soul Reapers.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Kenpachi Zaraki is one of the strongest and most fearless captains in Soul Society.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: He relies on raw strength and overwhelming spiritual pressure.
